requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Performance and ESDM Energy Label (Label Hemat Energi)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效性能与 ESDM 能效标签（Label Hemat Energi）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效性能與 ESDM 能效標籤（Label Hemat Energi）

summary.en: LED self-ballasted lamps and certain lighting products placed on the Indonesian market fall under the energy efficiency labelling scheme administered by the Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources (ESDM / Kementerian ESDM) through the Directorate General of New, Renewable Energy and Energy Conservation (EBTKE). The label hemat energi displays a star rating (typically 1 to 4 bintang) based on luminous efficacy (lm/W) measured against SNI test methods. Products in scope must be tested to the applicable SNI for self-ballasted LED lamps, achieve at least the minimum efficacy tier, and carry the ESDM star label on packaging before sale. The energy labelling obligation is separate from, and in addition to, the mandatory SNI safety/quality certification (SPPT-SNI). The Indonesian grid is 230 V, 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 在印度尼西亚市场销售的 LED 自镇流灯及部分照明产品，须受能源矿产资源部（ESDM / Kementerian ESDM）通过新能源、可再生能源与节能总局（EBTKE）管理的能效标签制度约束。label hemat energi 依据按 SNI 试验方法测得的光效（lm/W）显示星级（通常为 1 至 4 颗 bintang）。适用范围内产品须依据自镇流 LED 灯的适用 SNI 进行检测，至少达到最低能效档位，并在销售前于包装上标注 ESDM 星级标签。能效标签义务独立于强制性 SNI 安全/质量认证（SPPT-SNI），且为额外要求。印度尼西亚电网为 230 V、50 Hz。
summary.zht: 在印度尼西亞市場銷售的 LED 自鎮流燈及部分照明產品，須受能源礦產資源部（ESDM / Kementerian ESDM）通過新能源、可再生能源與節能總局（EBTKE）管理的能效標籤制度約束。label hemat energi 依據按 SNI 試驗方法測得的光效（lm/W）顯示星級（通常為 1 至 4 顆 bintang）。適用範圍內產品須依據自鎮流 LED 燈的適用 SNI 進行檢測，至少達到最低能效檔位，並在銷售前於包裝上標註 ESDM 星級標籤。能效標籤義務獨立於強制性 SNI 安全/質量認證（SPPT-SNI），且為額外要求。印度尼西亞電網為 230 V、50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources (ESDM) energy labelling regulation for self-ballasted LED lamps — label hemat energi / star rating (administered via EBTKE)
Applicable SNI for self-ballasted LED lamps — efficacy test method

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), which defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest) about 90 lm/W and above; Grade 2 about 80 lm/W and above; Grade 3 about 70 lm/W and above. Grade 3 is the minimum for the Chinese market. China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is administered by SAMR. The Chinese CEL grade is based on absolute lm/W thresholds and there is no mutual recognition with Indonesia's ESDM label hemat energi scheme.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）约 90 lm/W 及以上；2 级约 80 lm/W 及以上；3 级约 70 lm/W 及以上。3 级为中国市场最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）须向 CQC/CECP 注册，对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。中国 CEL 等级依据绝对 lm/W 阈值，与印度尼西亚 ESDM label hemat energi 制度不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）約 90 lm/W 及以上；2 級約 80 lm/W 及以上；3 級約 70 lm/W 及以上。3 級為中國市場最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）須向 CQC/CECP 注冊，對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。中國 CEL 等級依據絕對 lm/W 閾值，與印度尼西亞 ESDM label hemat energi 制度不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both markets operate mandatory energy labelling, but the schemes are independent with no mutual recognition. Indonesia's ESDM label hemat energi uses a star rating (bintang) determined by efficacy measured under Indonesian-recognised SNI test methods, whereas China's CEL uses Grade 1 to 3 based on GB 30255 thresholds. A Chinese CEL grade does not map to or substitute for an Indonesian star rating. Manufacturers must (1) have the product tested for efficacy against the applicable SNI, (2) register with ESDM to obtain the star rating, and (3) print the ESDM label on Indonesian packaging. Test reports must be accepted by the Indonesian scheme — Chinese GB/CEL reports are generally not directly accepted. Confirm exact minimum efficacy tiers and product scope against the current ESDM regulation for self-ballasted LED lamps.
gap.zh: 两个市场均实施强制性能效标签，但制度各自独立、互不承认。印度尼西亚 ESDM label hemat energi 采用星级（bintang），依据按印度尼西亚认可的 SNI 试验方法测得的光效确定；而中国 CEL 采用基于 GB 30255 阈值的 1 至 3 级。中国 CEL 等级不能映射或替代印度尼西亚星级。制造商须：（1）依据适用 SNI 对产品光效进行检测；（2）向 ESDM 注册以取得星级；（3）在印度尼西亚包装上印制 ESDM 标签。检测报告须被印度尼西亚制度接受——中国 GB/CEL 报告通常不被直接接受。请依据自镇流 LED 灯的现行 ESDM 法规核实确切的最低能效档位及产品适用范围。
gap.zht: 兩個市場均實施強制性能效標籤，但制度各自獨立、互不承認。印度尼西亞 ESDM label hemat energi 採用星級（bintang），依據按印度尼西亞認可的 SNI 試驗方法測得的光效確定；而中國 CEL 採用基於 GB 30255 閾值的 1 至 3 級。中國 CEL 等級不能映射或替代印度尼西亞星級。製造商須：（1）依據適用 SNI 對產品光效進行檢測；（2）向 ESDM 注冊以取得星級；（3）在印度尼西亞包裝上印製 ESDM 標籤。檢測報告須被印度尼西亞制度接受——中國 GB/CEL 報告通常不被直接接受。請依據自鎮流 LED 燈的現行 ESDM 法規核實確切的最低能效檔位及產品適用範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope products — ESDM energy label (label hemat energi / star rating) and registration required before sale for self-ballasted LED lamps within scope; separate from SPPT-SNI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required under GB 30255-2019 (minimum Grade 3 for market entry)

source.publisher: Kementerian Energi dan Sumber Daya Mineral (ESDM) — Republic of Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] In-scope self-ballasted LED lamps require the ESDM energy label (label hemat energi star rating) and ESDM registration before sale in Indonesia, in addition to mandatory SNI certification. The Indonesian star rating and China's CEL grade are independent schemes with no mutual recognition, and a Chinese CEL grade does not substitute for the Indonesian rating. Have efficacy tested against the applicable SNI and confirm the current minimum tiers and scope with ESDM before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 适用范围内的自镇流 LED 灯在印度尼西亚销售前，除强制性 SNI 认证外，还须取得 ESDM 能效标签（label hemat energi 星级）及 ESDM 注册。印度尼西亚星级与中国 CEL 等级为各自独立、互不承认的制度，中国 CEL 等级不能替代印度尼西亚星级。进入市场前，请依据适用 SNI 检测光效，并向 ESDM 核实现行最低档位及适用范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 適用範圍內的自鎮流 LED 燈在印度尼西亞銷售前，除強制性 SNI 認證外，還須取得 ESDM 能效標籤（label hemat energi 星級）及 ESDM 注冊。印度尼西亞星級與中國 CEL 等級為各自獨立、互不承認的制度，中國 CEL 等級不能替代印度尼西亞星級。進入市場前，請依據適用 SNI 檢測光效，並向 ESDM 核實現行最低檔位及適用範圍。

requirement_topic.en: Product Performance and Lifetime Claims under SNI Test Methods
requirement_topic.zh: SNI 试验方法下的产品性能与寿命标称
requirement_topic.zht: SNI 試驗方法下的產品性能與壽命標稱

summary.en: Beyond the headline efficacy used for the ESDM star label, LED lamps and luminaires certified under the mandatory SNI scheme must demonstrate declared performance characteristics through type testing at an LSPro-recognised laboratory using the applicable SNI (which adopt IEC performance standards such as IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamps and IEC performance methods for luminaires). Characteristics verified include luminous flux, luminous efficacy, colour rendering index (CRI/Ra), correlated colour temperature (CCT), and rated life / lumen maintenance. Declared values on packaging and marketing must be substantiated by the test report held by the LSPro, and the operating parameters must be rated for the Indonesian 230 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 除用于 ESDM 星级标签的主要能效外，依据强制性 SNI 制度认证的 LED 灯及灯具，须通过在 LSPro 认可实验室依据适用 SNI（采纳 IEC 性能标准，如自镇流 LED 灯的 IEC 62612 及灯具的 IEC 性能方法）进行的型式试验，证明所声明的性能特性。所核验的特性包括光通量、光效、显色指数（CRI/Ra）、相关色温（CCT）及额定寿命 / 光通维持率。包装及营销上的标称值须由 LSPro 持有的检测报告予以证实，且运行参数须按印度尼西亚 230 V、50 Hz 电源额定。
summary.zht: 除用於 ESDM 星級標籤的主要能效外，依據強制性 SNI 制度認證的 LED 燈及燈具，須通過在 LSPro 認可實驗室依據適用 SNI（採納 IEC 性能標準，如自鎮流 LED 燈的 IEC 62612 及燈具的 IEC 性能方法）進行的型式試驗，證明所聲明的性能特性。所核驗的特性包括光通量、光效、顯色指數（CRI/Ra）、相關色溫（CCT）及額定壽命 / 光通維持率。包裝及營銷上的標稱值須由 LSPro 持有的檢測報告予以證實，且運行參數須按印度尼西亞 230 V、50 Hz 電源額定。

standards_or_laws: Applicable SNI adopting IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps performance requirements
Applicable SNI adopting IEC performance methods for LED luminaires (CRI, CCT, flux, lumen maintenance)

summary.en: In China, LED lamp performance is governed by GB/T 24906 / GB/T 24908 series and related GB/T performance standards (covering luminous flux, efficacy, CRI, CCT, and lifetime), alongside the mandatory GB 30255 efficiency grades. CCC certification covers safety and EMC for in-scope luminaires but performance/lifetime claims are largely substantiated through GB/T testing. Chinese GB/T performance test reports are issued by CNAS-accredited laboratories but are not directly accepted by the Indonesian LSPro scheme.
summary.zh: 在中国，LED 灯性能由 GB/T 24906 / GB/T 24908 系列及相关 GB/T 性能标准管辖（涵盖光通量、光效、显色指数、色温及寿命），并配合强制性 GB 30255 能效等级。CCC 认证涵盖适用灯具的安全和 EMC，但性能/寿命标称主要通过 GB/T 检测予以证实。中国 GB/T 性能检测报告由 CNAS 认可实验室出具，但不被印度尼西亚 LSPro 制度直接接受。
summary.zht: 在中國，LED 燈性能由 GB/T 24906 / GB/T 24908 系列及相關 GB/T 性能標準管轄（涵蓋光通量、光效、顯色指數、色溫及壽命），並配合強制性 GB 30255 能效等級。CCC 認證涵蓋適用燈具的安全和 EMC，但性能/壽命標稱主要通過 GB/T 檢測予以證實。中國 GB/T 性能檢測報告由 CNAS 認可實驗室出具，但不被印度尼西亞 LSPro 制度直接接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 24906 / GB/T 24908 series — LED lamp performance requirements (SAC/SAMR)
GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: Although both Indonesia and China derive their LED performance methods from IEC standards (IEC 62612 and related), the conformity routes differ. Indonesia ties performance verification into the mandatory SNI type-testing process held by the LSPro, and declared values must trace to that report. Chinese GB/T reports are not directly accepted, so re-testing at an Indonesian-recognised laboratory is typically required as part of SNI certification. Manufacturers must ensure declared flux, efficacy, CRI, CCT, and rated life on Indonesian packaging match the SNI test report, and that the lamp is rated for 230 V, 50 Hz operation (China nominal voltage is 220/380 V). Verify the exact SNI version and applicable performance parameters with the LSPro before certification.
gap.zh: 尽管印度尼西亚与中国的 LED 性能方法均源自 IEC 标准（IEC 62612 及相关），但合格评定路径不同。印度尼西亚将性能验证纳入由 LSPro 持有的强制性 SNI 型式试验流程，标称值须可追溯至该报告。中国 GB/T 报告不被直接接受，因此通常须在印度尼西亚认可实验室重新检测，作为 SNI 认证的一部分。制造商须确保印度尼西亚包装上标称的光通量、光效、显色指数、色温及额定寿命与 SNI 检测报告一致，并确保灯具按 230 V、50 Hz 运行额定（中国标称电压为 220/380 V）。认证前请向 LSPro 核实确切的 SNI 版本及适用性能参数。
gap.zht: 儘管印度尼西亞與中國的 LED 性能方法均源自 IEC 標準（IEC 62612 及相關），但合格評定路徑不同。印度尼西亞將性能驗證納入由 LSPro 持有的強制性 SNI 型式試驗流程，標稱值須可追溯至該報告。中國 GB/T 報告不被直接接受，因此通常須在印度尼西亞認可實驗室重新檢測，作為 SNI 認證的一部分。製造商須確保印度尼西亞包裝上標稱的光通量、光效、顯色指數、色溫及額定壽命與 SNI 檢測報告一致，並確保燈具按 230 V、50 Hz 運行額定（中國標稱電壓為 220/380 V）。認證前請向 LSPro 核實確切的 SNI 版本及適用性能參數。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — performance parameters verified through SNI type testing as part of mandatory SNI certification; declared values must trace to the LSPro-held test report
mandatory_status.cn: Mixed — GB 30255 efficiency grade is mandatory (with CEL); GB/T performance standards substantiate declared flux/CRI/CCT/lifetime claims

source.publisher: Badan Standardisasi Nasional (BSN) — National Standardisation Agency of Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Performance characteristics (flux, efficacy, CRI, CCT, rated life) of LED lamps for Indonesia are verified through the mandatory SNI type-testing process held by the LSPro, and packaging claims must trace to that report. Chinese GB/T performance reports are generally not directly accepted, so re-testing at an Indonesian-recognised laboratory is typically required, and products must be rated for 230 V, 50 Hz. Confirm the applicable SNI version and parameters with the LSPro before certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向印度尼西亚的 LED 灯性能特性（光通量、光效、显色指数、色温、额定寿命）通过由 LSPro 持有的强制性 SNI 型式试验流程予以核验，包装标称须可追溯至该报告。中国 GB/T 性能报告通常不被直接接受，因此一般须在印度尼西亚认可实验室重新检测，且产品须按 230 V、50 Hz 额定。认证前请向 LSPro 核实适用 SNI 版本及参数。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向印度尼西亞的 LED 燈性能特性（光通量、光效、顯色指數、色溫、額定壽命）通過由 LSPro 持有的強制性 SNI 型式試驗流程予以核驗，包裝標稱須可追溯至該報告。中國 GB/T 性能報告通常不被直接接受，因此一般須在印度尼西亞認可實驗室重新檢測，且產品須按 230 V、50 Hz 額定。認證前請向 LSPro 核實適用 SNI 版本及參數。
